zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Johannes Toose於1450年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Alexandre Toose de Taunton15歲，母親Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton15歲。他和Johanna Combes至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1502年4月19日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特文斯福德聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Johannes Toose于1450年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Alexandre Toose de Taunton15岁，母亲Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton15岁。他和Johanna Combes至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1502年4月19日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特文斯福德聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Toose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tooze
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Gloucestershire): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Tos(s)e (Old English Tossa, a pet form of Torhtsige, from torht ‘bright’ + sige ‘victory’).

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Johannes Toose was born in 1450, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alexandre Toose de Taunton, was 15 and his mother, Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton, was 15. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Johanna Combes. He died on 19 April 1502, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Johannes Toose est né en 1450, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexandre Toose de Taunton, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Johanna Combes. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, So: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Johannes Toose 1450 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexandre Toose de Taunton 15 und seine Mutter Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton 15. Er hatte mit Johanna Combes mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 1502 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Johannes Toose è nato il nel 1450 nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexandre Toose de Taunton, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Johanna Combes. Morì il 19 aprile 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Johannes Tooseが1450年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Alexandre Toose de Tauntonは15歳，母Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Tauntonは15歳であった。彼はJohanna Combesとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1502年4月19日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィンスフォードスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, So: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윈스퍼드 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Johannes Toose(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexandre Toose de Taunton(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Johanna Combes(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 4월 19일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윈스퍼드 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Johannes Toose nasceu em 1450, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexandre Toose de Taunton, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Johanna Combes. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, So: ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, винсфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Johannes Toose родился в 1450 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexandre Toose de Taunton было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton, 15. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Johanna Combes. Он умер 19 апреля 1502 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, винсфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Johanna Combes. Murió el 19 de abril de 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary Magdalene's Church, Winsford, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
